notes: Valheim Data → Creatures: Base / 1★ / 2★ tabs now actually scale Health and attack damage per star, and Boar, Wolf, Lox and Asksvin show a green Tameable badge next to their biome chips. Stat parser was only reading the item format ("N (+N/lvl)") and skipped the creature format ("N/Nlvl"), so the star tabs were showing the same numbers — fixed.
